The US ⁠customs agency is readying a system within 45 days to process refunds on President Donald Trump’s tariffs that were struck down as illegal, a customs official said in a court filing on Friday.

news.headline: People are tracking this shepherd fleeing Israeli strikes in Lebanon
news.summary: People are tracking a shepherd who has been walking with his herd for days across Lebanon, fleeing Israeli strikes.

news.headline: 51 people have been killed in the last 24 hours in Sudan's Kordofan region
news.summary: First, 51 people have been killed in the last 24 hours in Sudan's Kordofan region due to clashes between the army and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces. news.headline: Russian athletes march at Paralympic opening ceremony
news.summary: Athletes from Russia and Belarus parade behind their nations' flags at the opening ceremony of the Milan-Cortina Winter Paralympics as the 50th anniversary edition of the Games officially gets under way.

news.headline: US issues limited licence for Venezuelan gold following high-level visit
news.summary: The licence follows a push from US President Donald Trump to open Venezuela's resource sector to outside investment.

news.headline: Why Melania Trump’s UN speech is an affront to decency
news.summary:
I am a sucker for all kinds of humour, including tasteless jokes. But I draw the line at sick jokes being reported as serious news. As far as those jokes go, the Monday appearance of US first lady Melania Trump as chair of a United Nations Security Council meeting takes the cake.
